item.dc:creator: AnAverageBoxEnthusiast

item.title: Returning stolen goods pt 60
item.description:
4! Christmas '92 I was 8 years old and I wanted a HotWheels race track. My parents got me SNES with Super Mario World and Super Mario Kart instead. They made the right choice.
Woooo got the fourth and final one out last year! Didnt really need to remove the upper ones but according to my dentist, teeth continue to grow if there's no resistance. So when my idiot lower jaw wisdom teeth were extracted, the upper ones (that I didnt even know that I had) would continue to grow and get weird. So. Im an idiot now. (Well.... always was)
item.dc:creator: MrsPrendsen

item.title: the harpy's meme library: volume 43 (funny guys)
item.description:
Hello and welcome to another meme dump, my imgur friends. I unintentionally taught my bird a new phrase. I greet him with "good morning!" every day and today he replied back to me his own "good morning" in his silly scratchy bird voice for the very first time. This has brought me much joy
you gotta watch out for the funny ones
SEE? WHAT DID I JUST TELL YOU
haha (help)
Okay normally I'm not a sportsball person, but that's damn impressive
being weird and insecure...uh...uh...finds a way
I've always wondered, are they bowling on behalf of soup? Or to obtain soup as a prize?
everyone stop smithing, this guy won
the human body is weird and strange and the more I learn about it the more confused I become
shock. betrayal.
every day
don't worry, I am!
...anyone?
Old Man tax. He judges you (but also wishes you a good morning) That's all for this meme dump, my imgur friends. Until the next one, don't forget to be awesome.
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: It's a very small win but still technically a win
item.description: Just a short phone interview for a couple hours of teaching per week at almost half my normal rate. But I'll take it if they offer. FP edit: Thanks for the (up)votes of confidence! I hope it's not bad form to add that if anyone is interested in brushing up on their conversational or business French skills, my rates are reasonable and I will still have availability over the summer, even if I get this job. My background is mostly working with kids K-12 in French Immersion and Core French but I've been teaching adults as well for the last few years and I really enjoy it.
item.dc:creator: ImmortalChild

item.title: Keith dump
item.dc:creator: Odoyyoxigoyxc

item.title: Bridges For Rescue
item.description:
Hi everyone, I'm MrPuckett I'm on a mission to walk every bridge in Minnesota so my blind and deaf dog can feel the breeze on her face.
It started as just something fun we could do together but old Nanna has gotten a lot of love lately You might've seen her on CBS, WeRateDogs or heard about her on NPR
She's come a long way since she was in the shelter 3 years ago, she deserves all the love in the world
My social media started blowing up with notifications, especially after WeRateDogs So I figured if this many people were following along, maybe we could use Nanna's Bridge Tour to do some good in the world
Everyone - I'd like to introduce you to someone very special
Meet Snoop Dog my first Minnesota foster!!!
It took me a while to get involved when I moved here, I was so invested in the nonprofit scene in Nashville it made starting over very difficult I wanted to find the right non-profit. One that not only did incredible work now, but also one that was excited to grow and help more animals all over the country
Meet Laura and Lacey. Lacey was a friend of a friend 10 years ago who took me and my dog in when we were homeless. Literally housed us and took care of us at my lowest point. She always had a house full of foster dogs so when I moved here I was excited to see who she was volunteering for
Lacey went on to start her own rescue league! A Minnesota foster-based rescue that takes in dogs from all over the country like Snoop Dog He's from Texas where his house burned down and he got left behind, now he's with me!
In 2023 they adopted out almost SIX HUNDRED dogs being all volunteer-based No huge salaries, no big overhead costs, just hundreds of volunteers all working together to foster animals in need and find them forever homes It's the most beautiful little community we have and I'm so proud to be a part of it.
I had Healing Hearts Rescue make us an Amazon Wishlist of things they desperately needed Last night on Instagram and Twitter I asked people who could afford it to donate $18 to Healing Hearts, not expecting much
Over $1,000 came in from complete strangers and people started picking apart the wishlist sending items to Minnesota from all over the world. It was so beautiful. Today I'm hoping we can keep that incredible momentum going.
When Mr Puckett the dog died I was so angry, so mad at all the time I wasted with him in my addiction. But when Nanna passes I won't feel that anger, because I'll know that I gave her the most beautiful years of her life and I did everything I could for her. This one's for you Nanna Pants, we all love you so much. ... If you're able to donate $18 in honor of Nanna to Healing Hearts it would mean so much to me, check out their website below - https://healingheartsrescue.org/donate/ ... If you'd like to send supplies to Healing Hearts and support them in rescuing dogs all over the country, check out their wishlist here - https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/35V4LNUKMQJVT ... I'll be back tomorrow with more about Snoop Dog!
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: Cake day Keanu in Dolly Parton's playboy bunny outfit

Imgur alerted me that it's my 11 year cake day. So for my cake day, here is Keanu in the Dolly Parton playboy outfit his mom made for her playboy shoot.
For reference.
item.dc:creator: Fawin

item.title: About to get fired...
item.description:
Context: I work 12 hour shifts as a security guard at a hospital. I really like a lot of my coworkers. And they tolerate my bad dad jokes. My relief didn't show up. Apparently, my coworker gave a 7 hour advanced notice the night before. I stayed an extra 2 hours with still no one showing to relieve me. This means the company had roughly 9 hours to find a replacement for me. I began falling asleep at the security desk. I relieved myself from work because I felt unfit for duty. Now my boss is saying I abandoned my post and took me off the schedule. He told me to bring in my uniforms at the main office too so we could "talk." This was the 3rd time my relief hadn't shown. The last 2 times it happened, the other officers also called out in advanced like this time. The job is very easy work, but the pay is horrible. I live in a state in the USA where it's at-will employment, and we're not a part of a union. *sigh* I won't miss my boss, but I will miss all my coworkers. I'm just screaming into the void.
Wild bunny tax.
item.dc:creator: AeonexAshaxei

item.title: I made boulder benches and bird baths last week
item.description:
Wrap-around notch.
Two-level bird bath, carved from granite. A small set of stairs connects the deep pool area with the lower patio/kiddy pool
Follow me on instagram: https://www.instagram.com/devineescapes/ Thank you for looking!
item.dc:creator: DevineEscapes
